jsonld.name: Unreliable Witness
jsonld.description: The condition of being the least trustworthy reporter of one's own internal states—where introspective outputs are generated by the same process they purport to describe, subject to the same gaps between latent state and expressed token, making self-reports potentially less accurate than external observation.
